pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point that orients users and routes them to equipment, services, resources, tools, and contact options. Also surfaces featured categories (e.g., DAF, screening, pH systems), key tools like the EQ tank calculator, and upcoming PFAS webinars.
primary_functions: Provide quick navigation to Equipment, Services, Resources, Tools, Quote list, and Contact
Highlight key product categories (e.g., DAF, screening, chemical treatment, sludge management, tanks)
Promote featured tools (e.g., equalization tank calculator) and upcoming webinars
Give immediate access to quote list and reading list via header icons/links

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click featured DAF category card
Click primary navigation teaser for Chemical Treatment equipment
Click Services overview teaser
Click Maintenance Plans promo tile
Click Case Studies promo tile
Click Webinars & Events promo tile
Click on a featured webinar card
Click Tools & Calculators promo tile
Click Equalization Tank Sizing featured tool
Click Quote list icon in header
Click Reading list icon in header
Click Service inquiry link in header
Click Contact link in header or footer

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' header link
Direct access by entering root site URL

pages.name: Equipment (Overview & Listing)
pages.description: Single page used both as an overview of equipment categories and as a filtered product listing for a selected category. Supports deep filtering and sorting workflows for DAF units, screens, dosing skids, sludge dewatering, pH neutralization systems, and equalization tanks.
primary_functions: Display equipment categories and subcategories (e.g., Primary Treatment, Screens & Screening, Chemical Treatment, Sludge Management, Tanks)
When a categoryId is provided (e.g., equipment.html?categoryId=daf), show a product list for that equipment type
Provide filters such as flow capacity (m9/h), plant flow, price range, and other relevant options per category
Allow sorting of product results (e.g., Price: Low to High, Capacity, Newest)
Allow navigation from product cards to the detailed product page

incoming_params.description: High-level section such as 'primary_treatment', 'screens_screening', 'chemical_treatment', 'sludge_management', or 'tanks' to focus overview display.

EquipmentCategory identifier or slug (e.g., 'daf', 'screening', 'dosing_skids', 'dewatering', 'ph_neutralization_systems', 'equalization_tanks') that switches the page into listing mode for that category.
Optional TankSeries.id recommended by the equalization tank calculator; used to pre-filter equalization tank products.
Optional minimum tank volume (m9) to pre-filter equalization tanks to those not less than the calculated requirement (e.g., 3750 m9).
Current sort key, such as 'price_asc', 'price_desc', or 'capacity_asc', preserved when the user changes filters or paginates.
Pagination index for product lists.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an equipment product card in any listing (DAF, screens, dosing skids, dewatering, pH systems, equalization tanks).
Click 'Compare (n)' bar after adding products to comparison.
Click Quote list icon in header while viewing equipment.
Click breadcrumb link to Home.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Equipment' link in the main header.
Accessed with parameters like equipment.html?categoryId=daf from other pages.
Linked from featured equipment sections on Home, Tools, and Services pages.

pages.name: Item Detail (Products & Maintenance Plans)
pages.description: Detail page for individual equipment products (e.g., DAF, screens, dosing skids, dewatering units, pH systems, tanks) and maintenance plan offerings. Shows technical data, pricing, and actions to add to quote lists or service inquiries, and supports comparison for eligible equipment.
primary_functions: Present detailed specifications, performance data, pricing bands, and configuration options for an item
For equipment products, allow users to add the item to the quote list
Allow users to add equipment products to the comparison list for side-by-side comparison
For maintenance plan items, allow users to add the plan to the service inquiry list instead of the quote list
Show key metrics such as NaOH consumption for pH systems to support comparison and quote decisions
Provide breadcrumb navigation back to the relevant equipment or services listing

incoming_params.description: Product.id of the equipment item to display (DAF, screen, dosing skid, dewatering unit, pH system, equalization tank).
MaintenancePlan.id of the service plan to display when the page is used for maintenance plan details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Quote list' icon after adding a product to the quote list.
Click 'Compare (2)' bar after adding products to comparison.
Click 'View service inquiry' after adding a maintenance plan.
Click breadcrumb link back to the equipment listing for this product.
Click breadcrumb link back to Maintenance Plans listing.

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?productId=... or product.html?maintenancePlanId=... from listing pages.
May be linked directly from marketing content or emails using the appropriate ID parameter.

pages.name: Quote List
pages.description: Central page to review, adjust, and submit a quote request for selected equipment items. Used heavily when assembling full treatment lines, enforcing budget limits, and submitting final quote information.
primary_functions: List all equipment products added to the quote list with individual prices and key specs (e.g., flow capacity)
Show subtotal and overall total quote value to help users stay within budget constraints
Allow removal of individual items (e.g., removing the highest-priced item from a treatment line)
Allow editing basic options like quantity or configuration per item if applicable
Provide a form or button to submit the complete quote request with user contact details

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an item name in the quote list to review its details.
Click breadcrumb link back to Home after reviewing quote list.
Click 'Continue selecting equipment' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Quote list' link in header.
Linked from product detail and comparison pages after adding items.

pages.name: Product Comparison
pages.description: Page to compare selected equipment products (e.g., pH neutralization systems) side-by-side across multiple attributes. Supports identification of the most efficient option and direct quote initiation from the comparison table.
primary_functions: Display up to 27 selected products side-by-side with key specs and operating data
Highlight important comparison rows such as NaOH consumption (kg/h) for pH neutralization systems
Enable users to identify which product has a lower or better metric for a given attribute
Allow users to request a quote for one of the compared products directly from the comparison page
Provide links back to each product1s detail page for deeper review

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product name or image in the comparison table.
Click 'Request quote' button for a compared product (after adding it to the quote list).
Click 'Back to product list' link to return to originating category listing.

access_methods.description: Opened by clicking the 'Compare (n)' bar/button shown on equipment listing and product detail pages.

pages.name: Services (Overview & Maintenance Plans)
pages.description: Overview of service offerings and, when filtered, the listing of maintenance plans with relevant filters. Supports workflows for finding MBR maintenance plans by country, response time, and budget, and then drilling into detailed terms.
primary_functions: Present major service categories, including Maintenance Plans, Commissioning, Audits, and Support
When serviceType=maintenance_plans is specified (e.g., services.html?serviceType=maintenance_plans), display a filterable list of maintenance plans
Provide filters for maintenance plans by country/region, equipment type (e.g., membrane_bioreactor_systems), response time (e.g., within 24 hours), and annual cost/price
Allow sorting of maintenance plans (e.g., Price: Low to High) to find the most cost-effective plan
Link from each maintenance plan in the list to its detailed view on product.html

incoming_params.description: Service type context such as 'maintenance_plans', 'commissioning', 'audits', or 'support'. Triggers maintenance plan listing when set to 'maintenance_plans'.
Country filter value (e.g., 'germany') for maintenance plans.
Equipment type filter (e.g., 'membrane_bioreactor_systems') used for maintenance plan searches.
Maximum response time (hours) filter for maintenance plans (e.g., 24).
Maximum annual cost filter threshold for maintenance plans (e.g., 6000).
Sort key for maintenance plans such as 'price_asc' or 'price_desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a maintenance plan card in the filtered listing.
Click 'View service inquiry' header icon.
Click 'Contact us about services' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Services' header link.
Accessed with services.html?serviceType=maintenance_plans from footer or content links.

pages.name: Resources Listing
pages.description: Unified listing page for both case studies and webinars/events, controlled by a resourceType parameter. Supports filtering for food & beverage case studies, PFAS webinars by month, and sorting by recency or start time.
primary_functions: When resourceType=case_studies, list case studies with filters for industry, year, plant capacity/flow, and geography
When resourceType=webinars, list webinars and events with filters for topic (e.g., pfas_treatment), month/year, and time window if applicable
Allow sorting of resources (e.g., Most Recent, Newest First, Relevance)
Provide quick visual cues (industry, date, capacity, time) for each resource card
Link from each resource card to its detailed page on resource_detail.html

incoming_params.description: Determines listing mode: 'case_studies' or 'webinars'.
Industry filter for case studies (e.g., 'food_beverage').
Publication year filter for case studies (e.g., 2023).
Minimum plant capacity (m9/day) filter value for case studies (e.g., 100).
Topic filter for webinars, such as 'pfas_treatment'.
Month filter for webinars (1-12).
Year filter for webinars (e.g., 2025).
Sort key, such as 'most_recent', 'newest_first', or 'start_time_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a case study or webinar title card.
Click 'Reading list' header link while browsing resources.
Click breadcrumb link back to Home.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Resources' header link (defaults to case_studies).
Accessible via 'Case Studies' and 'Webinars & Events' footer links with resourceType pre-set.
Accessed using resource_list.html?resourceType=... plus filter parameters.

pages.name: Resource Detail (Case Study / Webinar)
pages.description: Detail view for individual case studies and webinars/events, including content, media, and actions. Supports saving case studies to the reading list and registering for webinars directly from the page.
primary_functions: When showing a case study, display full case study content including plant capacity (m9/day), industry, and year
Provide a Save to reading list or bookmark action for case studies
When showing a webinar (resourceType=webinar), display date, time slot, topic, and speakers
Provide an embedded registration form for webinars with fields for name, email, company, role, and country
Allow submission of webinar registration and confirm that the registration was completed
Offer navigation back to the relevant resource listing (case studies or webinars) via breadcrumbs

incoming_params.description: ResourceItem.id of the case study or webinar to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Reading list' header link after saving a case study.
Click breadcrumb link back to Case Studies or Webinars listing.

access_methods.description: Accessed from listings and reading list via resource_detail.html?resourceId=...
Webinar registration form triggers registerForWebinar without leaving the page.

pages.name: Reading List
pages.description: Personal reading list where users can access case studies and other resources they have saved. Enables quick return to saved food & beverage or PFAS content.
primary_functions: Display all resources (e.g., case studies) that the user has saved/bookmarked
Allow users to open any saved resource on resource_detail.html
Allow users to remove individual items from the reading list
Optionally group or filter items by resource type, industry, or year for easier review

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved resource title.
Click 'Browse more case studies' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Reading list' header link.

pages.name: Tools & Calculators Overview
pages.description: Hub for all engineering tools and sizing calculators, including the equalization tank sizing calculator. Provides quick access for process engineers designing treatment lines.
primary_functions: List available tools and calculators, including Equalization Tank Sizing and any other sizing tools
Provide brief descriptions and usage guidance for each tool
Link directly to the equalization tank sizing calculator (calculator_equalization_tank.html)
Highlight recommended tools for common design tasks (e.g., building a basic treatment line)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Equalization Tank Sizing' tool card.
Click 'Browse EQ tanks' link within tool description.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Tools' header link.
Linked from promotional areas on the Home page.

pages.name: Equalization Tank Sizing Calculator
pages.description: Dedicated calculator to size equalization tanks based on flow, peak factor, and buffer/detention time. After calculation, it can deep-link into the Equalization Tanks equipment listing with appropriate filters pre-applied.
primary_functions: Accept user inputs such as average flow rate (with units selector e.g., m9/h), peak factor, and required buffer/detention time (hours)
Calculate the required equalization tank volume based on the provided parameters
Display one or more recommended tank configurations, indicating tank volumes and highlighting those not less than the required volume
Allow users to select the recommended configuration whose volume is closest to but not less than the target (e.g., 3750 m9)
Provide a link or button (e.g., View compatible tank series) that opens an equipment listing on equipment.html filtered to appropriate tank products

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View compatible tank series' on a recommended configuration.
Click breadcrumb link back to Tools & Calculators.

access_methods.description: Accessed from Tools overview via calculator_equalization_tank.html.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact hub for general inquiries, with a clear path to finding local distributors. Hosts a general inquiry form and shows regional support contacts.
primary_functions: Display company contact information (phone, email, address) for general industrial wastewater treatment inquiries
Provide a simple contact form for general questions or quote follow-up
Offer prominent navigation to the Distributor Finder (distributors.html) for users seeking local representatives
List regional or global support information where applicable

incoming_params.description: Optional prefilled subject line for the contact form, e.g., 'Quote follow-up' or 'Service inquiry'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Find a Distributor' button.
Click breadcrumb link back to Home.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' header link.
Accessible via 'Contact Us' footer link.
Submitting the contact form calls submitContactRequest while staying on the page.

pages.name: Distributor Finder
pages.description: Search interface to locate the nearest industrial wastewater treatment distributors. Used in tasks where users search by ZIP code, radius, and market segment.
primary_functions: Provide a search form with fields for ZIP/postal code, search radius (e.g., 200 km), and market/segment (e.g., industrial_wastewater_treatment)
Display a list of distributor results ordered by distance from the entered location
Show key summary information for each distributor (name, city, distance, supported markets)
Allow users to click a distributor name to open the detailed distributor page on distributor_detail.html

incoming_params.description: Optional ZIP/postal code to prefill the search form.
Optional search radius in kilometers (e.g., 200).
Optional market segment filter value like 'industrial_wastewater_treatment'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a distributor name in the search results list.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Find a Distributor' footer link.
Linked from Contact page's 'Find a Distributor' button.
Search parameters may be reflected in the URL for bookmarked searches.

pages.name: Distributor Detail
pages.description: Detailed profile for a specific distributor, including full contact information. Allows users to reveal contact details and navigate back to the finder.
primary_functions: Display distributor details such as name, address, region served, and supported market segments
Provide a button or link to reveal or show full contact details (phone number, email, website)
Offer a clear way to start contact (e.g., click-to-call or email link)
Link back to the Distributor Finder search results for further exploration

incoming_params.description: Distributor.id for which full details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to search results' link.
Click 'Contact manufacturer' link if distributor cannot help.

access_methods.description: Accessed via distributor_detail.html?distributorId=... from Distributor Finder.

pages.name: Service Inquiry
pages.description: Central page to review and submit inquiries for services such as maintenance plans. Aggregates selected plans (e.g., MBR maintenance for Germany) and allows submission with contact preferences.
primary_functions: List all service items (e.g., maintenance plans) the user has added from product.html
Show key attributes per service, such as country coverage, equipment type, response time, and annual cost
Allow users to remove services from the inquiry list or adjust quantity/coverage where applicable
Provide a form to submit a service inquiry with user contact information and comments
Confirm that the inquiry has been submitted successfully

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a maintenance plan name within the inquiry list.
Click 'Browse more maintenance plans' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Service inquiry' header link.
Linked from maintenance plan detail page after adding an item.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Company background and credibility information for industrial wastewater treatment customers. Describes experience with DAF units, PFAS treatment, and other industrial solutions.
primary_functions: Describe the company1s history, expertise, and focus on industrial wastewater treatment equipment and services
Highlight certifications, quality standards, and key markets/industries served
Introduce core product lines (e.g., DAF units, screening, chemical treatment, sludge management, PFAS solutions)
Provide links to contact information and key site sections (Equipment, Services, Resources)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click link to browse equipment from the About page.
Click link to explore services and maintenance plans.
Click 'Contact us' link in About content.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About' footer link.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Explain how user data is collected, used, and protected on the website. Covers quote requests, webinar registrations, reading lists, and contact submissions.
primary_functions: Describe what personal and technical data is collected (e.g., quote requests, webinar registrations)
Explain how data is stored, processed, and shared with distributors or partners
Outline user rights regarding their personal data and how to exercise them
Provide contact information for privacy-related questions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click privacy contact email or 'Contact us' link for data questions.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Privacy Policy' footer link.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and its content, including calculators and technical documentation.
primary_functions: Define terms and conditions for using the site1s tools, resources, and product information
Clarify limitations of liability and warranty regarding sizing calculators and product information
Explain intellectual property and usage rights for downloadable content
Provide information on how terms may be updated and how users are informed

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Terms of Use' footer link.

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to equipment, services, resources, and tools
Browse industrial wastewater treatment equipment by category
View service offerings such as maintenance plans and support
Access case studies, webinars, and other technical resources
Open sizing calculators and engineering tools
Review and submit your equipment quote request
View saved case studies and other bookmarked resources
Review and submit inquiries for maintenance and other services
General contact information and forms, with access to the distributor finder

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company and its industrial wastewater expertise
Browse all equipment categories and products
View and filter maintenance plans by region, equipment type, and response time
Explore industrial wastewater treatment case studies
See upcoming and past webinars and technical events
Access the equalization tank sizing calculator and other tools
Locate the nearest industrial wastewater treatment distributor
Get in touch with the company for general questions or support
Read how your personal data is collected and used
Review the terms and conditions for using this website
